mano_cua.result_summary: Tauri桌面应用，浏览器环境中window.__TAURI_IPC__不可用。UI界面正常渲染（菜单栏、侧边栏、编辑区域），但File→New File/Open File等所有文件系统操作因Tauri IPC缺失而静默失败。无法打开任何文件，标签栏始终为空，无法测试标签页名称显示功能
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Tauri desktop app running in browser. window.__TAURI_IPC__ is not a function error at menu.ts:7. All file system operations (New File, Open File, Ctrl+N) silently fail. Cannot open any files so tab name display cannot be tested.
